title: Meme In A Bottle
body:
## Meme In A Bottle ## This mod is inspired by a tweet from Pahimar where he joked about an idea for a mod called "Meme In A Bottle" on Twitter.
After seeing that tweet I knew I wanted to attempt to make it and so I did.

### To suggest memes please open an issue on the issue tracker. ### If you post your suggestions in the comments below there's a chance they'll be marked as spam.

List of memes currently in the mod
  • 1000 Degree Knife.
  • Bee Movie Script (Minecraftified).
  • Bill Cipher (Mostly because he's pretty much illuminati).
  • Clippy (Microsoft Office Assistant Meme).
  • Dancing Hotdog (Snapchat meme).
  • Dangerous to go alone, take this.
  • Dankey Kang.
  • Dat Boi.
  • Doge.
  • Donald Trump.
  • Eduard Khil (Trololo guy, R.I.P).
  • Fidget spinner.
  • Forever Alone.
  • Grand Dad [7 Grand Dad].
  • Grumpy Cat.
  • He-Man Sings / HEYYEYAAEYAAAEYAEYAA.
  • Inception meme (Something inside something *presses inception button*).
  • John Cena.
  • Keyboard Mechanical (Mostly known in a small group of friends).
  • Leather Belt (WoW Meme).
  • Literally Me copypasta.
  • Meme Big Boi (JacksFilms meme).
  • Moonman.
  • Navy Seal copypasta (Minecraftified).
  • Nigel Thornberry.
  • Nyan Cat / Tac Nayn.
  • Oscar.
  • Pills here.
  • PPAP.
  • Roadman Shaq (ting goes skrra).
  • Robbie Rotten.
  • Sanic.
  • Shrek.
  • Skeletal Doot.
  • Skywalker hates sand.
  • Wasted (Grand Theft Auto).
There are also some sound only memes, but too many to list.
This mod is still not even close to it's final form, I'm planning on adding way more memes.

I'm not responsible for any damage done to your computer if you downloaded this mod from any other website then Curse/Curseforge

Credits to Glassmaker, Garophel, DarkVicious for helping me fix stuff where needed.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"
